candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents label; preferred over cash flow ending cash.
Component of cash, but less comprehensive than the explicit total cash and cash equivalents line.
Restricted cash is typically excluded from CHE baseline.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Matches cash amount but from cash flow sheet; balance sheet label is preferred.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash total.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit current liabilities total.

candidates.why: Best clean total for current financing debt; captures short-term interest-bearing liabilities and avoids lease line.
Current portion of long-term debt; useful if no cleaner current debt total existed, but could overlap with current interest-bearing liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Current Part of long - term liabilities
candidates.why: Also a current debt component, but likely overlaps with current interest-bearing liabilities.
Debt component only, not the full short-term debt total.
Semantically ideal, but appears blank and less clearly reported than current interest-bearing liabilities.
Component only and appears blank.

variables.notes: Chose a clean reported total for current interest-bearing debt. Excluded lease liabilities and did not add LT debt/current portion components to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Exact tax payable/current tax liabilities label.

candidates.why: Under IFRS this is the standard balance-sheet label corresponding to property, plant and equipment, net.
Also a valid PPE net total label, but appears as a balancing/auxiliary line here.
Would be acceptable if reported, but not the primary visible reported line here.
Gross tangible assets, less preferred than net PPE total.

variables.notes: Selected the reported tangible fixed assets line as the best PPE proxy; preferable to gross or balancing lines.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Intermediate subtotal before working capital changes, not final OANCF.

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line.
